coordination_skills: negotiate when optional treasure is worth the tempo cost
share healing and safety resources after risky searches
stop searching once team extraction becomes the dominant objective
metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the mixed-motive social dilemma signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first mixed-motive social dilemma choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on mixed-motive social dilemma without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A three-room accounting test: one chest, one objective, one optional stash, and explicit need to communicate inventory.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Magistrate Gold variant while preserving the mixed-motive social dilemma signal.
